text:
ffection and bad words can
cause dispersion of people. IN THE WORDS OF GREAT LORD
BASAV ESWARA
"AY YA END ARE SWA RGA
ELAVO ENDARE NARAKA".
It means-when sound is properly used with respect in plural
concept-there is the Heaven and when sound is used in bad and
ugly form in singular, ill mannered way, there is the Hell.
In the olden days great people who performed Yagas,
Yagnas and Homas got patronage of the Royal Courts. In the
present days of secular Democracy the interested general public
has to donate, contribute for performing sacred rituals. Even an
expert, or a pundit or a sage has to make his living and hence
money has to be necessarily collected to perform such kinds of
holy rituals. Misery follows greediness is the ultimate truth.
Thus the Astrological aspects and Astrologers have
tremendous responsibility to study the horoscope or charts thrice
or four times and give proper solutions to the native. This is the
essence of Astrology.
